response: TEMPERATURE ROLL IS A KEY FACTOR IN ACHIEVING THE RIGHT TEMPERATURE FOR YOUR PROJECT. THE TEMPERATURE OF THE ENVIRONMENT AFFECTS THE PERFORMANCE OF THE SYSTEM. THE TEMPERATURE OF THE AIR IS IMPORTANT FOR THE FUNCTIONING OF THE DEVICE. THE TEMPERATURE OF THE WATER IS CRITICAL FOR THE PROCESSING OF THE MATERIAL. THE TEMPERATURE OF THE TOOL IS IMPORTANT FOR THE MAINTENANCE OF THE EQUIPMENT. THE TEMPERATURE OF THE ROOM IS AFFECTING THE RESULTS OF THE EXPERIMENT. THE TEMPERATURE OF THE MATERIAL IS IMPORTANT FOR THE ANALYSIS OF THE DATA. THE TEMPERATURE OF THE SYSTEM IS AFFECTING THE OUTPUT OF THE PROGRAM. THE TEMPERATURE OF THE DEVICE IS IMPORTANT FOR THE PERFORMANCE OF THE TOOL. THE TEMPERATURE OF THE PROCESS IS CRITICAL FOR THE SUCCESS OF THE TASK. THE TEMPERATURE OF THE SOLUTION IS IMPORTANT FOR THE REACTIVITY OF THE REACTION.
